response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with roughly 18 years of software development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runner and assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators, Selenium training courses). However, this is a Level II people-management role requiring at least 2 years of formal people management and 3 years of technical leadership, and the resume shows no people-management experience, no direct reports, and no organizational-change leadership. Mobile experience exists but is dated (iOS/Apple TV, 2015-2016). The gap between a hands-on IC profile and a manager-of-managers-track role is too large for this position.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling background: authored test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), built CI/deploy infrastructure, and worked on MCP/agent tooling
18+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Strong quality-engineering culture fit: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, and a track record of teaching/mentoring via workshops and courses
concerns: No formal people-management experience — the role requires 2+ years managing engineers with 1:1s, performance expectations, and team development
No demonstrated experience setting team roadmaps or leading organizational change at the required scale
Mobile-platform experience is limited and nearly a decade old, while the role centers on a large mobile platform ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure expertise
Limited formal technical leadership and roadmap ownership
